overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene set in a medieval castle courtyard or Quidditch pitch, featuring wizard characters in robes conversing on a grassy field. Historic stone towers with red and gold banners rise in the background under a bright partly cloudy sky.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sunny castle courtyard with historic stone towers adorned with red and gold banners. Groups of students in wizard robes stand conversing on the grass - one group on the left discusses amongst themselves while on the right, a student holding a broomstick gestures while talking to companions. The camera remains stationary, capturing the medieval architecture and bright daylight atmosphere of the training grounds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, wide-angle view of a sun-drenched medieval castle courtyard where students gather for training. It begins by capturing the imposing scale of historic stone towers adorned with vibrant red and gold banners under a bright, partly cloudy sky. The focus then settles on the grassy grounds, where groups of students in wizard robes are engaged in conversation. On the left, a small cluster of students discusses amongst themselves, while the view expands to the right to reveal a student gesturing with a broomstick while talking to companions. The scene concludes by maintaining this steady gaze, emphasizing the peaceful atmosphere and architectural grandeur of the training grounds.
